items.title: 5 AI Prompts to Build a Top-Tier Marketing System for YOUR Business
items.excerpt: Most marketers copy someone else’s playbook. Here’s how to use AI to build one that fits YOUR business. And learn my updated 8-layer prompting technique demonstrated in each prompt.
items.summary: A guide presents five AI prompts designed to help businesses create customized marketing systems rather than copying existing frameworks. The article demonstrates an 8-layer prompting technique for developing business-specific marketing strategies using artificial intelligence.
items.pullQuote: AI prompts create customized marketing systems instead of copying playbooks

items.title: There was no ROI

items.summary: An analysis examines cases where technology implementation failed to improve productivity or provide return on investment. The piece explores why certain technological solutions do not enhance users' productive capabilities despite expectations.
items.pullQuote: Technology did not improve their productive lives

items.title: Why The World Baseball Classic Succeeds Where Olympic Baseball Falls Short

items.pullQuote: WBC structure creates superior competition compared to Olympic baseball

items.title: #383 ‒ AMA #81: Biological aging tests, longevity training, emerging therapies, GLP-1 RAs, sun exposure, and more
items.excerpt: "If there was anything wrong with seed oils in modest quantities (again beyond the caloric effects of any oil), I'm still waiting for someone to present a convincing case for that.” —Peter Attia The post #383 ‒ AMA #81: Biological aging tests, longevity training, emerging therapies, GLP-1 RAs, sun exposure, and more appeared first on Peter Attia.
items.summary: Dr. Peter Attia addresses longevity training protocols, biological aging assessments, and emerging therapeutic interventions in his latest AMA session. The discussion covers GLP-1 receptor agonists, optimal sun exposure guidelines, and Attia's stance that seed oils in modest quantities lack convincing evidence of harm beyond caloric effects.
items.pullQuote: seed oils in modest quantities lack convincing evidence of harm

items.title: Helios: Real real-time long video generation model

items.pullQuote: Real-time long video generation breakthrough transforms content creation

items.title: Sir Tony Hoare has died
items.excerpt: Article URL: http://lefenetrou.blogspot.com/2026/03/in-memoriam-tony-hoare.html Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47316880 Points: 183 # Comments: 43
items.summary: Computer science pioneer Sir Tony Hoare, inventor of the quicksort algorithm and Hoare logic, has passed away. His contributions to programming language theory and formal verification methods fundamentally shaped modern computer science education and practice.
items.pullQuote: Computer science pioneer who invented quicksort algorithm dies
